calendar.matters:
Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CLAIMANT TODD BANKS Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chaune Williams, Esq., (510-596-1777) appearing telephonically on behalf of Todd Banks, Respondent/Claimant and moving party.
Seth Harris, Esq., of McCarthy & Holthus, LLP (619-955-1529) appearing telephonically on behalf of Quality Loan Service Corp., Petitioner and opposisng party.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: CLAIMANT TODD BANKS' Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds is continued to 12/04/13 at 9:30 am in this Dept. No Appearance is required if the money is posted before that date. Moving party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Continued To Nov-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chaune Williams, Esq., Attorney at Law, (510-225-9300), for Todd Bank, Claimant and moving party.
John Dressler, Esq. of McCarthy & Holthus, (510-541-8537), SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR Quality Loan Service Corp., Petitioner and opposing party.

ARGUED by Petitioner. Court grants Petitioner's request for the Clerk's Office to accept the check (surplus funds) for deposit. Petitioner's counsel is instructed to prepare the order. CLAIMANT TODD BANKS' Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds is continued to November 21, 2013 at 9:30am in Dept. 501 for further hearing. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CLAIMANT TODD BANKS' Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds - The petition is continued to November 14, 2013, to be heard in Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles real property/foreclosure matters. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CLAIMANT TODD BANKS' PETITION FOR DISCHARGE OF STAKEHOLDER AND RELEASE OF PROCEEDS.

Appearances: Chaune Williams (510.596.1777) appearing via Court Call for Claimant Todd Banks; Melissa R. Coutts of McCarthy & Holthus, LLP (619.685.4800 x1976) appearing via Court Call for petitioner Quality Loan Service Corp.

Discussed and the Court continues the matter to November 4, 2013 in Department 302 at 9:30 am. The Court receives via email the following documents: Petition for Discharge of Stakeholder and Release of Proceeds; Memorandum of Points and Authorities in Support; Declaration of Chaune Williams, Esq. In Support of Petition for Discharge of Stakeholder and Release of Proceeds; Notice of Non-Opposition to Petition for Discharge of Stakeholder and Release of Proceeds; Proposed Order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)
